title: Data Explorer
description: The Data Explorer enables researchers to interactively browse, query, and assess the quality of data within connected sources. The integrated Data Quality Dashboard provides standardized metrics to evaluate completeness, conformance, and plausibility across CDM domains.
tips: Run a Data Quality assessment on a new data source before building cohorts to identify known gaps or anomalies in the data.
Filter Data Quality results by domain and check type to focus remediation efforts on the most clinically significant issues.
Compare Data Quality metrics across time periods to detect upstream ETL regressions after data refreshes.
Use the Data Explorer to validate that expected clinical events are present for a pilot cohort before scaling your study.
Document and share Data Quality findings with your data engineering team to drive continuous improvement in source data pipelines.
